lightsail.disk.addon.CfnAbout: `AddOn` is a property of the [AWS::Lightsail::Disk](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-resource-lightsail-disk.html) resource. It describes the add-ons for a disk.

lightsail.disk.addon.AutoSnapshotAddOnRe.Description: The parameters for the automatic snapshot add-on, such as the daily time when an automatic snapshot will be created.

lightsail.disk.addon.Status.Description: The status of the add-on.  Valid Values: `Enabled` | `Disabled`
